item.title: An "illness" is spreading through the Trucker Convoy.
item.description: Tried to remove ads where possible. And before you say it, no, I'm not happy that people are getting ill. I just find the irony of it all funny. Plus, "Talladega Nights" is hilarious. Sauce: https://www.vice.com/en/article/4aw8gw/dc-trucker-convoy-ricky-bobby?utm_source=email&utm_medium=editorial&utm_c
item.dc:creator: MyCommentsUsuallyHaveTypos

item.title: Bought this for my 13yo… I hope they like it.
item.description: I struggle with his pronouns since he came out. I’m doing my best and I don’t mean to misgender him. This is an attempt to be supportive. Their mother and I have been divorced for half their life and our relationship has been strained at times. I know it’s just a pin but I’m hoping it shows him that I’ll be here for him and he doesn’t have to be afraid to be himself. Viral edit: you guys have convinced me, I have order a sticker with the same image as the pin and I plan to wear it on my hard hat. As a construction worker I look forward to confronting the ignorant and explaining why wearing it is important.
item.dc:creator: mikeerk365

item.title: This was banned on the art website Artstation
item.description:
Artstation deliberately bans all pro Ukraine artworks and hereby supports the russian warmongers and atrocities. They refuse all discussion about the subject and pretend nothing is happening. Art should not be censored, and certainly not this. There are dozens of artworks that have since been removed or where commenting is no longer possible. (Not my artwork but trying to spread the word.)
https://www.instagram.com/p/CbQJ-lNKx97/
item.dc:creator: Divisionby9
